steps.title: Focus on Sirius A's mass
steps.content: The student's goal is not to define solar masses generally or discuss Proxima Centauri. The sentence must make Sirius A the subject and foreground its mass of 2.063 solar masses.

steps.title: Reject off-target details
steps.content: Choice A focuses on Proxima Centauri and general units. Choice B defines solar masses without naming Sirius A. Choice C omits Sirius A entirely. Only the remaining choice centers Sirius A's mass. The answer is D.
